titleStmt.title: SII 24.488: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 488. (A.R. No. 104 of 1938-39.) PAGALPATTU-MAṆḌAPAM, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Damaged. Describs the ten avatāras in verses and records gifts of lamps for Raṅganātha, Lakshmī, Vishvaksēna, Garutmān etc. and gold for conducting festivals and offerings to the various deities by Kumāra Achyuta, son of Chinna-chevva and Mūrt-yambā. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1489 expressed by the chronogram nidh-ibha-abdhi-chandra, Prabhava, Vaiśākha śu. pūrṇimā correspond to 1567 A.D., April 23, Wednesday, ·33; the nakshatra was Viśākhā, ·97. There was an eclipse of the moon on this day, not specified in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: śubhamastu . śrīraṅgēśāya namaḥ . śrīraṅgēśvaradēvasya cinnacēvvēndra sūnunā . vikhyātāccuta
bhūpēna kṛtam kaiṅkaryyamīdṛśam . [.*1] Abdē śākē nidhi
bhābdhicandra samkhyāsamanvitē [.] varṣē śrī
prabhavābhikhyē māsē
p.note: sē is written below the line.
p.hi: vaiśākhanāmakē . [.2*] pakṣēvaḷakṣē puṇyāyām pūrṇimā[*yā] mmahātithau . kā
vērīsaritastīrē raṅganāthasya sannidhau . [.3*] Ādāya sōmaka śśi ṣya
p.note: sē is written below the line.
p.hi: lipivēdākṣaraissamam . varṇṇavyava
sthitikṛtē vaisāriṇyavapuṣmatē . [.4*] Āsādya vasudhāmūlamavanāya divaukasām . citrannavasudhāmūlakarmma
ṇē kūrmmarūpiṇē . [.5*] tasmai varāhavapuṣē dharaṇī
ṇīm balāt [.] sindhōruddharatō yasya damṣṭrāntat kratāndadhau . [.6*]
hiraṇya sūtra karalōhakaśāhatāt . nakhasandamśikāgrēṇa nārasimhāya karṣatē . [.7*] bhikṣitvā
tripadīm baddhā tayā dānavakuñjaram . śakṛādhīnam kṛtavatē trailōkyam vāmanātmanē . [.8*] rājanyaka śrī rhantum dīkṣita
ntu paraśvadham . mahābhavē
sthitavatē mānyabhārggavamūrttayē . [.9*] Utbhida raāvaṇam bhūyō saṅkhyērāvaṇa sambhṛtaiḥ
Āśritya dāśarathitāmākulī kurvvatē divam . [.10*] Ākulīkṛdya
sali lam halaśṛṅgēṇa yāmunam . rōhiṇīsambhavōcitya
kāriṇē balarūpiṇē . [. 11*] śāśvatabrahmacakrēṇa samrakṣitaparikṣitē . tathāpyanēkagōpastrīkāminē kamsavairiṇē . [.12*] samhṛtya saka
lāsumnēśān sarvvam samrakṣatē jagat . sadēvamaṇiśōbhāya sārvvabhāvanamūrttayē . [.13*] Indirāyā jaganmāturmmandirāyitavakṣasē . cchandasāmādi ka(m)ndāya cam
pakadyutivāsasē . [.14*] vandārumuni sandōha (mandāha) mandāradharaṇīruhē bṛndārakādhipārāti bṛndāhantōpahaāriṇē . [.15*] kaustubhāruṇapāndējā pārśva
līnāḷimālayā . vanamālikayā cāruvakṣasē hatarakṣasē . [.16*] kaivalya kalpalatikā kandaḷōpaghnakīrttayē . kāvērīlaharīhāramaddhyēndumaṇirōci
ṣē . [.17*] bhāṣyakūlaharōttuṅga paryyaṅkavaraśāyinē . raṅganāthāya harayē raviśītāmśucakṣuṣē . [.18*] raṅganāthapadāmbhōjaraṅga bhū nya stacētasā[.]rāmābhi
rāmavapuṣā ratīśasadṛśatviṣā . [.19*] śrutyartthānimiṣēṇārtthi vratanamramahīvṛtā . parām kṣamāndhārayatā pragyānu[gatēna ca ?]
. [. 20*] virōdhibalijētrā ca viprasāt
[kṛtabhūminā .] kṣōpā caratā ravibhūbhaṅgakāriṇā . [.21*] satyānuraktamanasā sarvvabhāvādhikaśriyā . Aśēṣānasurārātē ravatārānvivṛṇvatā . [. 22*] dhīrāśa
� samabhāvita . sadāhimakarōtbhāsikīrttinā karuṇābdhinā . [. 23*] samrakṣatā dvijānāptanandanēna viśēṣataḥ . mānyēna sumanastōmai rmmahī
pākēna mūrttyambācēsva
bhū payōḥ śrī vīrācyutabhūpāla śēkharēṇa samarppitān . [.25*] sannidhau raṅganāthasyaṣam
dīpān
lakṣmyāḥ pa
dīpāndayānidhēḥ . [.26*] viṣvaksēnasya dīpau dvau dīpamēkam garutmataḥ . divāniśam sthāpayitundīpānagrē catu
rddaśa . [.27*] prakalpata varāhāṇām sāṣṭatrimśaccatuśśa . tamṣaḍvarāhā dīpavarttikṛtē pañcapaṇōttarāḥ . [.28*] pratyabdam dīparakṣitrōrvvarāhā dvādaśa dvayōḥ . trimśat sthā
lāni dithānnai
ḥ pūrṇṇāni prativāsaram . [.29*] Amuṣya raṅganāthasya nivēdayitu mādarāt . sāṣṭaṣaṣṭhitriśatagam sārddhasaptapaṇānvim [. 30*] sahasrantu varāhāṇām pra
tivarṣam pra[kalghitam .] varāhā tnnānām vyamjanānām trayādhikam . [.31*] kanīghō vimśatisthālam tandivyānnamanvaham . śrīraṅgalakṣmyāḥ puratō nivēdayitumādarāt . [. 32*] śatuśśatava
rāhāṇām ṣaṭpañcāśatsamanvitā . pratisamvatsaram sārddhapaṇadvitayasam yutā . [. 33*] catustrimśadvarāhāsta dvyamjanānām prakalpitāḥ . rathōtsavēṣu pū
rvvēṣu śrīsa varānnōtsavāt . [.34*] Anantaram harērasya mahataśśramaśāntayē . samarppitānāntriśatavaṭikānāmmahīyasām . . [. 35*] tat samkhyātirānāñca
suhiyatriśatasya ca .
pañcaśa tēsthaligasya ca . ḥ[. 36*] tatsaṅkhyātirasāpūpānām caturbhāramitasya ca . lājasya śrīṣaṣabhāṇḍayavāgūnām rasaspṛśām . [. 37*] ṣaṣṭhibhā
ṇḍa draśām . daddhyōdanasthalīyugmamutgannasthali yugmayōḥ . [.38*] tintriṇyā pūrṇṇastālastālayugasya ca śrīpūrṇṇapātra
sa tsamkhyāmupēyuṣām . [.39*] dadhicandanakarppūratāmbūlānām vidhi tyōtsavā tēṣāmsakalānandakāriṇām . [.40*] rūpava
ramśatam . yatpāvasā- vēndrasya ramāpatēḥ . [.41*] vidhāyatasya mahatō śatasya ca . dvayōttarasya madhuradōsāpū
[paśatasya ca .] [.42*] śatavarāhāssa catuṣpaṇāḥ . cēvvakṣmāpakumārēṇa śrīvīrācyutabhūpatā . [.43*] prakhyātē phātlgunē māsē kalpitasyaguhē dinē . rathō
tsavasya mahatō varāhāṇāñcatuśśatam . [.44*] rathōtsavāt jyēṣṭhamāsakalpitādapyanantaram . prativarṣam mahīsālasahasrasya ramāpatē ḥ . [.45*] purōnivēdanīyasya pūrṇṇasyā
nnaissudhōpamaiḥ . varāhāṇāmśatam pañca vimśatyadhibhyakam kṛtam . [. 46*] śrīpañcaśatyatirasāstatsaṅkhyavaṭikānyapi . tatsaṅkhyāsuhi yāpūpā dōsāpūpaśatadvaya
m . [.47*] pūpāstathaiva ca . kṣīrānnabhāṇḍadviśatī ghṛta pra sthaśatatrayam . [. 48*] tsambhārāśca dadhi . sahasrasamkhyādīpānām prasa
pañcāśat nirasavanti ca . [. 49*] tadvat pānagabhāṇḍāni nā ṇi dhūpakarppūrakastūrīpuṣpaka . [. 50*]
naivēdyayōstanyatām samupēyuṣām . tē ṣām varāhaśatakam pañcavimśatisamkhyakam . [. 51*] śrīraṅgalakṣmyāḥ kalpitam
m pa
śaduttaram . [.52*] śrīnānāmaṇḍapasudhālēpānā[m dviśatam . sahasrañca varāhāṇām tiruppaṇikṛtēkṛtam . [. 53*] vihaṅgānām
maṇḍapē . nirōdhavāgurāhētō rvarāhāṇā
vimśati[m .] [.54*] varāhāṇām paṇā
lakṣmyā Utsavasya mahīyasaḥ [. 55*] śata
krēvarāhāṇām pa
pa
śadu ttaram . tannaivēdyasya varāhāṇā
[. 56*] śrīmadēm
pērumāḷākhyadēvasyaivārccanākṛtē Ācakravarāhāṇām śatam pa
śaduttaram . sa sya pañcāśatdviśa syasaṅkhyayā . mitānu
vāpīkūpataṭākaiśca kāsārāmaiśca samyutāt . śrīraṅganāthadēvēna bhōgyācandratārakam . kumārācyutabhūpēna kumārasamatējasā . parasmai raṅganāthāya bhaktyāgrā
māt samarpitān . Amūn śilāśāsanasthānā candrārkkam vidhitsunā . dharmmamarmmaikaviduṣā . karmmayāmbhōnithindunā cinacēvvamabhīpāla śrīkarēṇamanasvinaā . samsthāpitasya
sasyaissamanvitān . sarvvamānya ścatussīmāsamyutāmśca samantataḥ . nidhinikṣēpapāṣāṇasiddhasāddhyajalārpitān . Akṣisāhāmisamyukāndēvabhōgyāthasānahā .
ŚRIRAṄGA

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.488 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
